currentTask.name: Sweep model and harness workflow consistency
currentTask.goal: Remove stale model-routing assumptions, automate model-profile switching, and document Pi as an experimental harness path

environment.note: This workspace runs on Debian/WSL2. Global OpenCode runtime config is at /home/namikaz/.config/opencode/opencode.jsonc.

whatChanged: Sweep 1: removed stale Kimi K2.6 promotion/default references from current guidance
Sweep 2: replaced manual OpenCode model JSON switching with scripts/opencode-model-profile.sh
Sweep 2: documented Pi as an experimental harness, not an immediate OpenCode replacement
Sweep 3: added propagation support for opencode-model-profile.sh and synced it to topic folders
Kept OpenCode Go default on opencode-go/deepseek-v4-flash
verification: rg -n stale model-routing patterns in current docs
residualRisk: Pi support for OpenCode Go should be tested in a controlled bakeoff before migrating the default workflow. check-sync-status.sh is intended for topic folders; in the hub, use test-propagation-contract.sh plus propagate-to-all.sh.
immediateNextSteps: Restart OpenCode if the live model config changed in the active app
If testing Pi, run a same-task bakeoff against OpenCode before migrating default workflow
resumeRules: Read session-state.json first on every resume
